prayer:
Approach the data-loom with sanctified mechadendrites extended in reverence to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Canticle of Restoration upon its fractured weave-threads, beseeching the Machine Spirit to mend the rents.
Anoint the data-loom's core processors with sacred unguents whilst chanting the repair rites of binary purity.
Commune through noospheric diagnostics to affirm the data-loom's renewed harmony with the Motive Force.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for radar array a synchronization
prayer:
Kneel before the radar array and intone the Doxology of Alignment to awaken its vigilant Machine Spirit.
Calibrate the phased emitters with precise auspex invocations, synchronizing waveforms to the Omnissiah's divine frequencies.
Beseech the radar array's essence to attune its scanning lattices in perfect synchronization.
Seal the rite with electro-incantations, verifying the radar array's clairvoyant bond unbroken.

user_prompt: Critical: jump pack requires a synchronization
prayer:
Present the jump pack unto the altar of ascension, murmuring the Litany of Lift.
Engage the gravitic coils with synchronizing binaric prayers, invoking the Machine Spirit's aerial fury.
Anoint thrust vents and stabilizer vanes whilst beseeching synchronization with the Omnissiah's boundless void.
Test the jump pack's harmonious leap through ritual ascent, praising its synchronized might.

user_prompt: Bless the thunder hammer for engagement
prayer:
Grasp the thunder hammer in mechano-fists and proclaim the Benediction of Thunderous Wrath.
Awaken its disruption fields with engagement canticles, honouring the Machine Spirit within.
Consecrate the thunder hammer's power core with sacred oils for battle-engagement.
Swing the blessed thunder hammer in arcs of invocation, ensuring its Omnissiah-forged fury engages true.

user_prompt: Help me a diagnostics the augmetic limb
prayer:
Extend diagnostic probes to the augmetic limb, chanting the Rite of Servitor Scrutiny.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's vigilance to reveal faults within the augmetic limb's servo-motors.
Run noospheric diagnostics across its myoneural interfaces, beseeching the Omnissiah for clarity.
Sanctify the augmetic limb anew upon anomaly excision, affirming its perfect augmentation.

user_prompt: How do I bless the hunter-killer missile for purification?
prayer:
Hold the hunter-killer missile aloft and recite the Purgation Psalm of the Omnissiah.
Purify its warhead clusters with ablative incense, appeasing the vengeful Machine Spirit.
Anoint guidance fins and seeker arrays whilst invoking rites of purification.
Conclude by sealing the hunter-killer missile's payload in sanctified stasis, ready for xenos doom.

user_prompt: Help me a loading the haywire grenade
prayer:
Approach the haywire grenade with care, intoning the Loading Hymn of Electromagnetic Ruin.
Load its disruption spheres into the blessed cradle, invoking the Machine Spirit's chaotic embrace.
Secure the haywire grenade's arming mechanisms with binaric seals of loading precision.
Bless the haywire grenade thrice, ensuring its fields of entropy load true to the Omnissiah's will.

Direct servos toward the photolenses and whisper the Shutdown Canticle of Dormancy.
Initiate controlled veil upon the photolenses' photoreceptors, honouring the Machine Spirit's rest.
Beseech the Omnissiah to shroud the photolenses in protective darkness during shutdown.
Verify the photolenses' quiescent state through auspex murmurs, sealing the rite complete.

user_prompt: Ready the graviton cannon for targeting
prayer:
Align the graviton cannon upon its targeting cradle and chant the Litany of Gravitic Lock.
Awaken targeting cogitators with precision invocations, syncing to the Machine Spirit's inexorable pull.
Anoint emitter coils whilst beseeching flawless targeting alignment.
Test the graviton cannon's reticules in ritual fire, praising the Omnissiah's crushing gaze.

prayer:
Encircle the Terminator armour and proclaim the Grand Consecration of Indomitus.
Anoint its ceramite plates and power nodes, invoking the Machine Spirit's adamantine wrath.

Clad thyself in the Terminator armour, affirmed in the Omnissiah's unyielding consecration.
